criteria.reason: Shell markup and shared styling now implement the denser operator-workbench direction with stronger panel chrome.
Shared primitives in style.css were comprehensively updated for forms, panels, status states, file/search surfaces, and modal chrome.
Snapshots, Build Bundle, Search, and Prompt renderers were visibly restructured with stronger technical panel composition.
File, search, metadata, progress, and prompt/code surfaces now use more mature developer-tool treatments.
API calls and interaction logic remained intact, and both JS syntax validation and Python compilation passed.
Spec, evidence bundle, raw artifacts, and verdict were updated and the task artifact schema validated successfully.
